news.t: Angel Oak Capital Advisors Continues Success With ETF Platform as Angel Oak Income ETF Crosses $100 Million in Assets Under Management
Angel Oak Capital Advisors' UltraShort Income ETF Surpasses $100M in Assets in One Year, Sets Stage for ETF Platform Growth in 2024
Angel Oak Capital Advisors Launches Income ETF Focused on Residential Mortgage Credit Opportunities

overview.description: The Angel Oak Income ETF (CARY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that aims for current income by broadly investing in USD-denominated fixed income securities with a tilt towards structured products and residential mortgage. Securities could be of any credit quality or maturity. CARY was launched on Nov 7, 2022 and is issued by Angel Oak.

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors Continues Success With ETF Platform as Angel Oak Income ETF Crosses $100 Million in Assets Under Management
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CARY--Angel Oak Capital Advisors announces the Angel Oak Income ETF (NYSE: CARY) has crossed $100 million in assets under management.

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors' UltraShort Income ETF Surpasses $100M in Assets in One Year, Sets Stage for ETF Platform Growth in 2024
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CARY #ETF--Angel Oak Capital's UYLD ETF crosses $100 million in one year as firm prepares to expand ETF platform to deliver more structured-credit-driven funds.

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors Launches Income ETF Focused on Residential Mortgage Credit Opportunities
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CARY #ETF--Angel Oak Capital launches second actively managed ETF with a focus on residential mortgage credit.
